programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: The ageless Pies host the 2025 minor premiers who will be desperate for redemption after last year’s straight set finals heartbreak.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: Jason Horne-Francis and the Power will kick off their 2026 season against the Kangaroos at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: Gold Coast Suns vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: Round 1 concludes with the Eagles opening their 2026 campaign with a trip to the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Hawthorn Hawks vs Sydney Swans
programme.desc: The Hawks host the Swans in Round 2.

programme.title: Adelaide Crows vs Western Bulldogs
programme.desc: Adelaide hosts the Western Bulldogs in Round 2.

programme.title: Richmond Tigers vs Gold Coast Suns
programme.desc: The Tigers clash with the Suns in Round 2.

programme.title: Fremantle Dockers vs Melbourne Demons
programme.desc: The Dockers kick off their home campaign against the Dees.

programme.title: Port Adelaide Power vs Essendon Bombers
programme.desc: The Power get their first home game of the season against the Bombers.

programme.title: Queensland Firebirds vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The Vixens begin their quest to go back-to-back as they travel to Queensland to take on last year's wooden spooners at Nissan Arena.

programme.title: West Coast Fever vs Sunshine Coast Lightning
programme.desc: After a heartbreaking grand final loss the Fever will be out for revenge as they begin their season hosting the Lightning at RAC Arena.

programme.title: Adelaide Thunderbirds vs West Coast Fever
programme.desc: The Thunderbirds and Fever clash in Adelaide.

programme.title: Giants Netball vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The Giants host the Vixens in Sydney.

programme.title: NSW Swifts vs Mavericks
programme.desc: The Swifts host the Mavericks in Sydney.

programme.title: Melbourne Demons vs St Kilda Saints
programme.desc: The Demons host the Saints in a big Round One clash at the MCG.

programme.title: Greater Western Sydney Giants vs St Kilda Saints
programme.desc: The Giants play host to the Saints in Round 2.

programme.title: West Coast Eagles vs North Melbourne Kangaroos
programme.desc: The Eagles welcome the Roos to WA in a battle of up-and-coming teams/

programme.title: Chinese Grand Prix
programme.desc: The F1 season heads to Shanghai as George Russell chases a second straight win, while Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc aims to disrupt the Silver Arrows’ early dominance.

programme.title: Dolphins vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane is the venue for a Queensland Derby expected to involve plenty of points.

programme.title: Sydney Roosters vs Penrith
programme.desc: Watch Round 3 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Newcastle vs Warriors
programme.desc: Watch Round 3 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Cronulla vs Dolphins
programme.desc: Watch Round 3 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: South Sydney vs Wests Tigers
programme.desc: Watch Round 3 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: North Queensland vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: Watch Round 3 of the NRL on Kayo.
